name: AnalysisModelModalAnalysisProperties
summary: The AnalysisModelModalAnalysisProperties class contains information related to analysis model modal analysis properties.

constructors.name: AnalysisModelModalAnalysisProperties
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisModelModalAnalysisProperties class

properties.name: ModalAnalysisIncludeSelfWeightMass
properties.summary: Indicates whether selfweight mass is included in the modal analysis.

properties.name: ModalAnalysisMassLoadGroupDirections
properties.summary: The mass load group directions of the modal analysis.

properties.name: ModalAnalysisMassLoadGroupFactors
properties.summary: The mass load group factors of the modal analysis.

properties.name: ModalAnalysisMassLoadGroupIds
properties.summary: The mass load group indentifier of the modal analysis.

properties.name: ModalAnalysisModel
properties.summary: Indicates whether a modal analysis model is used.
